name: Cyber Security
tagline: Think like an attacker, build like a defender.
description: Offensive and defensive security fundamentals, from networks to secure systems.

milestones.title: Networking & Systems
milestones.learning_goal: Understand the terrain: networks, operating systems, and protocols.

weekend_project.title: Home Lab
weekend_project.brief: Build a segmented virtual lab to attack and defend.

milestones.reflection_prompt: What did a packet capture reveal you didn't expect?

milestones.title: Web Security
milestones.learning_goal: Find and fix the vulnerabilities that break real apps.

weekend_project.title: Bug Bounty Sprint
weekend_project.brief: Responsibly find and report real vulnerabilities.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which vuln class was easiest to miss?

milestones.title: Cryptography
milestones.learning_goal: Use cryptography correctly — and recognize when it's misused.

weekend_project.title: Encrypted Vault
weekend_project.brief: Build a secrets vault with sound crypto choices.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Where would rolling your own crypto have failed?

milestones.title: Defensive Security
milestones.learning_goal: Detect, respond to, and recover from attacks.

weekend_project.title: Detection Lab
weekend_project.brief: Simulate an attack and build detections for it.

milestones.reflection_prompt: How long until you'd have noticed the breach?

milestones.title: Secure Development
milestones.learning_goal: Ship software that's hard to break.

weekend_project.title: Secure a Codebase
weekend_project.brief: Threat-model and harden an existing app.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which dependency was your biggest risk?

milestones.title: Governance, Risk & Compliance
milestones.learning_goal: Connect security to business risk and real-world frameworks.

weekend_project.title: Risk Register
weekend_project.brief: Build a risk register and remediation roadmap.

milestones.reflection_prompt: Which risk was cheapest to reduce most?
